speaker: Annie
text: Hi Mom, I’ll be home late tonight. 🙏

speaker: Annie
text: Yeah, just a long day. A bit of tiredness, nothing big. 😴

speaker: Mom
text: Make sure to eat something warm; your wellness comes first. 🤗

speaker: Annie
text: I will, thanks! You’re my constant joy. 😀 ❤️

speaker: Annie
text: Love you too. Tomorrow morning I might sleep in a little. 💤

speaker: Mom
text: That’s fine. Your body needs rest after all the madness of school. 😌

speaker: Annie
text: Exactly. A quiet morning sounds like happiness. 😇

speaker: Mom
text: Take a walk if the weather is nice; a little fresh air brings freedom to the mind. ✌️

speaker: Annie
text: Great idea. Maybe we can have breakfast together when I wake up. ☕🤗
